/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-g++-13 -g CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/vecAdd.cu.o CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/vectorDotProduct.cu.o CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/DEVICE.cu.o CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/blockReduceSum.cu.o CMakeFiles/EXEFILE.dir/src/treeReduction.cu.o -o EXEFILE   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
